items.title: Feds Approve Minnesota's Plan To Combat Medicaid Fraud
items.description: Minnesota may soon receive the release of $243 million in deferred Medicaid funds after the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services approved the state's updated plan to combat Medicaid fraud, Minnesota state health officials told a federal court last week.

items.title: Justices Won't Review Lab Owner's Kickback Conviction
items.description: The U.S. Supreme Court on Monday declined to review the conviction of a former California biotech president sentenced to eight years in prison for lying about the efficacy of his company's COVID-19 and allergy testing and conducting a $70 million Medicare fraud scheme.
